---
title: "My Talk in UNAL - Estimating specificity, sensitivity and prevalence under three diagnostic tests"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2014-05-29"
categories:
  - "Community and Events"
  - "Inference"
---

[In this talk](http://gutierrezandres.files.wordpress.com/2014/05/beamer.pdf)

we adress a real problem: estimating some parameters of interest (such as the prevalence of a disease) under three diagnostic test.
